input.question: show me portfolio summary with allocation
input.original_question: show me portfolio summary with allocation

data.enhanced_question: Show me a portfolio summary with allocation. Provide total portfolio value, daily change percentage (absolute and percentage), previous close value, year-to-date (YTD) return, and 1-year performance. Include sector allocation percentages and asset class allocation breakdown with weight percentages and current market values.

metadata.enhancement_summary: Added specific data requirements for KPIs (value, changes, returns) and allocation breakdowns (sector/asset class) to guide the financial script.
metadata.original_question: show me portfolio summary with allocation
